articles.title: CERN Discovers New Particle After Upgrading Large Hadron Collider - ScienceAlert
articles.description: The Large Hadron Collider has discovered a new particle, the 80th identified so far by the world's most powerful particle smasher, Europe's CERN physics laboratory announced Tuesday.
